parsed_output.justification: Eric admits to starting as a Werewolf and claiming to have seen another Werewolf, yet he aggressively attempts to divert the vote toward Mitchell. This contradictory behavior—openly admitting to a villainous role while simultaneously framing another player—is a common tactic used by Werewolves to confuse the Village. While Mitchell also admits to starting as a Werewolf, he suggests he is no longer one, and Justin's claim that Mitchell was the Tanner makes Mitchell a less likely target for a Village win.
